channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lime bike abandoned on narrow part of street right outside à house, 15th April
item.description:
Abandoned Lime bike now with rubbish in its basket abandoned and obstructing pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown at bottom of tree trunk - preventing use of parking bay, 15th April
item.description:
Tree opposite 111 Nightingale lane is overgrown at bottom of trunk so it is not possible to park within the parking bay
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road markings not visible on roundabout, 15th April
item.description:
Crittals corner road markings need to be refreshed more often, hard to see and hard to select correct lane in good time
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas Canisters and Kids Toys on Street, 15th April
item.description:
At the roundabout, towards Froissart Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince John Road, Eltham

item.title: Glengall road, 15th April
item.description:
Pavement needs sweeping
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London

item.title: Abandoned diverted traffic sign, 15th April
item.description:
Abandoned diverted traffic sign outside sidara opposite stairs for chancery lane station

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, Holborn, Holborn, Greater London

item.title: More dog waste bags, 15th April
item.description:
More dog waste bags have appeared in the alleyway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Witham Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Multiple broken and uneven paving stones, 15th April
item.description:
A number of paving stones have a been broken and are a trip hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: And yet again, 15th April
item.description:
It is absolutely grim on the street. We need a permanent solution. Who is best to speak to?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle lane glass and various debris, 15th April
item.description:
I have had 3 punctures in a month and half using the Thames Road cycle path. Any chance we could get it swept the entire length from the roundabout at Northend Road to the junction of Crayford way. There is glass a various points along the path and loose gravel and stone chippings all along it which are a hazard causing wheels to lose grip. This stretch of cycle path never seems to be maintained since it was laid.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 15th April
item.description:
Yet again another abandoned vehicle from the same Romanian family they seem to treat our streets like a rubbish tip and dumping ground for there cars and vans.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please empty overflowing bin, 15th April
item.description:
Please empty overflowing flowing bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnes Cray Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste on pavement, 15th April
item.description:
There is food waste all over the pavement probably after the bins and waste was collected.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clitheroe Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of clothes, 15th April
item.description:
A number of bags of believed clothes abandoned on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Alma Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree damage Gordon House Road, 15th April
item.description:
The tree has been damaged, stake pulled out and water bag damaged
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32-34, Gordon House Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 15th April
item.description:
Wood dumped on grass under bushes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Samuel Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped shelving and storage boxes, 15th April
item.description:
Reported yesterday. Just been notified it has been resolved. It hasn’t. I’m looking at it all right now. It took 3 goes to get the last mess removed. Now on my 2nd attempt to get this one sorted. Hard to Fix My Street if you can’t even find it. Shelving and storage boxes dumped over a week ago. Sat and Mon the roving council collection truck sat and looked at the stuff and just drove away, but took other items just across the street. Why ignore it?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Kennington Park Place, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 15th April
item.description:
Bed and chair dumped on grass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Samuel Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous position of central reservation, 15th April
item.description:
Another serious accident in Welling Way caused by the position of the central reservation/ pedestrian refuge outside 124 Welling Way. Vehicles mis-judged or do not see the kerb and raised platform in centre of roadway. Vehicles are forced wider in this section of roadway due to residents parking bays, which causes vehicles to mis-judge the gap and hit the kerbs. This morning has seen a vehicle hit it and then strike multiple bollards on opposite side of road towards Bellegrove Road and vehicle overturn and roll a considerable distance ending on its roof with serious injury to vehicle occupants. Miraculously no pedestrians were hit by car.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flags by halfway street shops, 15th April
item.description:
Not a health and safety risk but tatty, broken and haphazard. Pointless and looks awful
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 182, Halfway Street, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
